Build in public.
Automatically.

Log your build activity. Auto-generate devlog entries. Draft X posts. Export your timeline. Everything an indie maker needs to ship in public — in one dashboard.

Try FreeSee Pricing

Your Dashboard

Everything saves locally. Nothing leaves your browser until you export.

0 entries

No entries yet. Click "+ Add Entry" to log your first build activity.

📝

Log Activity

Track every build, deploy, milestone, and learning. One-click entry. Local storage. No accounts.

📋

Generate Devlogs

Auto-generate MDX devlog entries from your activity — ready to paste into your Astro or Next.js site.

🐦

Draft X Posts

Each entry becomes a tweet. Groups become threads. Copy, paste, post. Consistent cadence, zero effort.

Simple Pricing

Free to start. Upgrade when you need more.
